word.tr_en: to represent; to stand for; to express
word.tr_de: etw. repräsentieren; für etw. stehen; etw. ausdrücken

phrase.ph: 【迷：めい】【惑：わく】している【気：き】【持：も】ちを【表：あらわ】す
phrase.rom: meiwaku shite iru kimochi o arawasu
phrase.tr_en: to express the feeling of being annoyed
phrase.tr_de: das Gefühl ausdrücken, genervt zu sein
phrase.rem: rephrased by ChatGPT

sentence.s: これは【何：なに】を【表：あらわ】しますか。
sentence.rom: Kore wa nani o arawashimasu ka?
sentence.tr_en: What does this stand for?
sentence.tr_de: Für was steht dies?

word.tr_en: to take off sth.; to detach sth.; to unfasten
word.tr_de: etw. wegnehmen; etw. entfernen; etw. aufbinden

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: このネジは【簡：かん】【単：たん】に【外：はず】せます。
sentence.rom: Kono neji wa kantan ni hazusemasu.
sentence.tr_en: These screws can be easily unfastened.
sentence.tr_de: Diese Schrauben kann man leicht wegnehmen.

word.tr_en: to oppose; to disobey

phrase.ph: 【流：なが】れに【逆：さか】らって【泳：およ】ぐ
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【決：けっ】して【両：りょう】【親：しん】に【逆：さか】らうな。
sentence.rom: Kesshite ryōshin ni sakarau na.
sentence.tr_en: Never disobey your parents.
sentence.tr_de: Widersetze dich niemals deinen Eltern.

word.tr_en: to give sth. as a present; to award so.

phrase.ph: 【誕：たん】【生：じょう】【日：び】に【贈：おく】る
phrase.tr_en: to give as a birthday present

phrase.ph: 【自：じ】【転：てん】【車：しゃ】を【贈：おく】る
phrase.tr_en: to give a bicycle (as a present)

phrase.ph: 【先：せん】【生：せい】に【本：ほん】を【贈：おく】る
phrase.tr_en: to give a book to the teacher (as a present)
phrase.tr_de: dem Lehrer/der Lehrerin ein Buch schenken

sentence.s: リサちゃんに【人：にん】【形：ぎょう】を【贈：おく】った。
sentence.rom: Risa-chan ni ningyō o okutta.
sentence.tr_en: I gave Risa a doll (as a present).
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe Risa eine Puppe geschenkt.

sentence.s: 【珍：めずら】しい【花：か】【瓶：びん】を【贈：おく】ってくれた。
sentence.rom: Mezurashii kabin o okutte kureta.
sentence.tr_en: I got a rare flower vase as a present.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe eine seltene Blumenvase als Geschenk bekommen.

word.tr_en: to vomit; to throw up; to confess

phrase.rem: jisho has n2

sentence.s: 【何：なん】【度：ど】も【吐：は】いてしまいました。
sentence.rom: Nando mo haite shimaimashita.
sentence.tr_en: I have vomited several times.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe mich mehrmals übergeben.

word.tr_en: to live; to get along
word.tr_de: ein Leben führen; über die Runden kommen

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】と【彼：かれ】は【別：べつ】【々：べつ】に【暮：く】らしている。
sentence.rom: Kanojo to kare wa betsu-betsu ni kurashite iru.
sentence.tr_en: She and he live separately.
sentence.tr_de: Sie und er leben getrennt.

word.tr_en: to make a mistake; to err; to mislead
word.tr_de: einen Fehler machen; sich irren; irreführen
word.rem: jisho has n1

phrase.ph: 【判：はん】【断：だん】を【誤：あやま】る

sentence.s: その【薬：くすり】は【誤：あやま】って【使：つか】うと【毒：どく】になる。
sentence.rom: Sono kusuri wa ayamatte tsukau to doku ni naru.
sentence.tr_en: That medicine becomes a poison if it is wrongly used.
sentence.tr_de: Dieses Arzneimittel wird zum Gift, wenn man es falsch anwendet.

word.tr_en: to mind; to care about
word.tr_de: daran denken; sich um etw. kümmern

phrase.tr_en: that's no problem; I don't care
phrase.tr_de: kein Problem; das kratzt mich nicht

sentence.s: どちらでも【構：かま】わない。
sentence.rom: Dochira de mo kamawanai.
sentence.tr_en: It doesn't matter which one.
sentence.tr_de: Beides ist mir recht.

word.tr_en: to twinkle; to glitter; to sparkle

phrase.ph: 【輝：かがや】いている【宝：ほう】【石：せき】
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

phrase.explanation_en: typically used metaphorically for abstract things
phrase.explanation_de: typischerweise im übertragenen Sinn verwendet für abstrakte Sachen
phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n3 for kagayaku

sentence.s: 【星：ほし】が【輝：かがや】いていた。
sentence.rom: Hoshi ga kagayaite ita.
sentence.tr_en: The stars twinkled.
sentence.tr_de: Die Sterne glitzerten.

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】の【顔：かお】は【喜：よろこ】びに【輝：かがや】いていた。
sentence.rom: Kare no kao wa yorokobi ni kagayaite ita.
sentence.tr_en: His face was beaming with joy.
sentence.tr_de: Sein Gesicht strahlte vor Freude.

sentence.s: 【海：うみ】が【太：たい】【陽：よう】の【光：ひかり】で【輝：かがや】いている。
sentence.rom: Umi ga taiyō no hikari de kagayaite iru.
sentence.tr_en: The sea is glistening in the sunlight.
sentence.tr_de: Das Meer glitzert im Sonnenlicht.

word.tr_en: to hit; to beat; to punch
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section; jisho has n2

phrase.tr_en: to hit back; to strike back

sentence.s: 【殴：なぐ】られました。
sentence.tr_en: I was beaten.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin zusammengeschlagen worden.
sentence.explanation_en: 「殴られる」is the passive form of「殴る」
sentence.explanation_de: 「殴られる」ist die passive Form von「殴る」

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【僕：ぼく】の【顔：かお】をひどく【殴：なぐ】った。
sentence.rom: Kare wa boku no kao o hidoku nagutta.
sentence.tr_en: He struck me a heavy blow in the face.
sentence.tr_de: Er schlug mir brutal ins Gesicht.

word.tr_en: to apply for; to ask for; to subscribe for
word.tr_de: beantragen; sich bewerben; sich für etw. einschreiben

phrase.ph: 【結：けっ】【婚：こん】を【申：もう】し【込：こ】む
【入：にゅう】【学：がく】を【申：もう】し【込：こ】む

sentence.s: 【奨：しょう】【学：がく】【金：きん】を【申：もう】し【込：こ】むつもりだ。
sentence.rom: Shōgakukin o mōshi-komu tsumori da.
sentence.tr_en: I'm going to apply for a scholarship.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe vor, mich für ein Stipendium zu bewerben.

word.tr_en: to finish sth.

sentence.s: その【本：ほん】は【読：よ】み【終：お】えましたか。
sentence.rom: Sono hon wa yomi-oemashita ka?
sentence.tr_en: Are you through with this book?
sentence.tr_de: Hast du dieses Buch fertig gelesen?

word.tr_en: to tear sth.; to break through sth.; to disturb sth.

phrase.explanation_en: The prefix ぶち indicates that the action is done forcefully.
phrase.explanation_de: Das Präfix ぶち zeigt an, dass Gewalt im Spiel ist.
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for buchi-yaburu; the hint actually comes from jisho entry for ぶっ

sentence.s: 【小：こ】【林：ばやし】さんは【約：やく】【束：そく】を【破：やぶ】った。
sentence.rom: Kobayashi-san wa yakusoku o yabutta.
sentence.tr_en: Mr Kobayashi broke his word.
sentence.tr_de: Herr Kobayashi hat sein Versprechen nicht gehalten.

word.tr_en: to order sth.; to command; to appoint
word.tr_de: etw. befehlen; etw. anordnen; etw. festlegen

phrase.ph: そうするように【命：めい】じる
phrase.tr_en: to command so. to do it
phrase.tr_de: jem. befehlen, es so zu machen

sentence.s: 【兵：へい】【隊：たい】たちは【撃：う】つように【命：めい】じられました。
sentence.rom: Heitai-tachi wa utsu yō ni meijiraremashita.
sentence.tr_en: The soldiers were commanded to shoot.
sentence.tr_de: Den Söldnern wurde befohlen zu schiessen.
sentence.rem: rephrased by ChatGPT; 兵士 would be slightly better (more formal), but is n1

word.tr_en: to attempt; to try out; to test
word.tr_de: etw. versuchen; etw. ausprobieren; etw. testen

phrase.ph: もう【一：いち】【度：ど】【試：ため】す
【自：じ】【分：ぶん】の【力：ちから】を【試：ため】す
phrase.tr_en: to put one's own abilities to the test
phrase.tr_de: die eigenen Fähigkeiten auf die Probe stellen
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; there is also 腕試しする・うでためしする, which is nx

sentence.s: 【試：ため】してみるぞ。
sentence.rom: Tameshite miru zo.
sentence.tr_en: I'll have a try.
sentence.tr_de: Ich probier's mal aus.

word.tr_en: to elapse; (time) passes

phrase.ph: 【何：なん】【年：ねん】も【経：た】ってから【帰：かえ】ってくる
phrase.rom: nan-nen mo tatte kara kaette kuru
phrase.tr_en: to come home after many years
phrase.tr_de: nach vielen Jahren nach Hause kommen

sentence.s: 【時：じ】【間：かん】がどんどん【経：た】った。
sentence.rom: Jikan ga don-don tatta.
sentence.tr_en: Time went quickly.
sentence.tr_de: Die Zeit verstrich schnell.

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【会：かい】【社：しゃ】に【勤：つと】めて【２：に】【年：ねん】も【経：た】たないうちに、【語：ご】【学：がく】の【力：ちから】を【認：みと】められた。
sentence.rom: Kare wa kaisha ni tsutomete ni-nen mo tatanai uchi ni, gogaku no chikara o mitomerareta.
sentence.tr_en: He had not been employed by the company two years before his linguistic abilities were recognized.
sentence.tr_de: Er war noch keine zwei Jahre im Unternehmen beschäftigt, als seine sprachlichen Fähigkeiten anerkannt wurden.

word.tr_en: to sting; to prick; to stab
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section; jisho has n2

phrase.tr_en: to prick one's finger with a needle
phrase.tr_de: sich mit einer Nadel in den Finger stechen

sentence.s: 【蜂：はち】に【刺：さ】されました。
sentence.rom: Hachi ni sasaremashita.
sentence.tr_en: I was stung by a bee.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin von einer Biene gestochen worden.

word.tr_en: to speak of sth.; to narrate; to recite

phrase.ph: 【戦：せん】【争：そう】の【記：き】【憶：おく】を【語：かた】る
phrase.tr_en: to tell (the story of) memories of war
phrase.explanation_en: 語る adds weight and is more vivid than just 話す
phrase.explanation_de: 語る verleiht mehr Gewicht und ist ausdrucksstärker als nur 話す

sentence.s: 【祖：そ】【母：ぼ】は【私：わたし】にいろいろな【物：もの】【語：がたり】を【語：かた】ってくれた。
sentence.rom: Sobo wa watashi ni iro-iro na monogatari o katatte kureta.
sentence.tr_en: My grandmother told me various stories.
sentence.tr_de: Meine Grossmutter erzählte mir verschiedenste Geschichten.

word.tr_en: to catch up (with); to be compensated
word.rem: ChatGPT says 追いつく is more common than 追い付く

sentence.s: 【君：きみ】に【追：お】いついた。
sentence.rom: Kimi ni oi-tsuita.
sentence.tr_en: I caught up with you.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe dich eingeholt.

sentence.s: 【急：いそ】げば、【彼：かれ】に【追：お】いつけるでしょう。
sentence.rom: Isogeba, kare ni oi-tsukeru deshō.
sentence.tr_en: If you hurry, you might catch up with him.
sentence.tr_de: Wenn du dich beeilst, kannst du ihn vielleicht einholen.

word.tr_en: to pay; to make a payment

phrase.ph: 【家：や】【賃：ちん】を【支：し】【払：はら】う
クレジットカードで【支：し】【払：はら】う
phrase.tr_en: to make a payment by credit card
phrase.tr_de: mit der Kreditkarte eine Zahlung tätigen

sentence.s: すぐ【支：し】【払：はら】うよう【求：もと】められています。
sentence.rom: Sugu shiharau yō motomerarete imasu.
sentence.tr_en: I am being asked to make the payment immediately.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin zur sofortigen Zahlung aufgefordert worden.

word.tr_en: to run over (with a vehicle)
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.225

phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n4 for nigeru, n3 for 轢く
jisho has nx, but n3 for korosu, 轢く

sentence.s: 【昨日：きのう】、【車：くるま】で【猫：ねこ】をひいてしまいました。
sentence.rom: Kinō, kuruma de neko o hīte shimaimashita.
sentence.tr_en: Yesterday, I unfortunately ran over a cat with my car.
sentence.tr_de: Gestern habe ich leider eine Katze mit dem Auto überfahren.

word.tr_en: to be missing; to come loose

phrase.tr_en: to cut one's way through; to fight one's way through
phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n5 for kiru, n3 for nukeru

sentence.s: 【風邪：かぜ】が【抜：ぬ】けない。
sentence.rom: Kaze ga nukenai.
sentence.tr_en: I can't get rid of my cold.
sentence.tr_de: Ich werde meine Erkältung nicht los.

sentence.s: 【歯：は】が【二：に】【本：ほん】【抜：ぬ】けている。
sentence.rom: Ha ga ni-hon nukete iru.
sentence.tr_en: Two teeth are missing.
sentence.tr_de: Zwei Zähne fehlen.

word.tr_en: to surprise so.; to startle so.
word.rem: appears in Doraemon 12 p.89 as odorokasu

phrase.ph: わざと【驚：おどろ】かせる

sentence.s: 【子：こ】【供：ども】たちはドアの【陰：かげ】に【隠：かく】れて、【先：せん】【生：せい】を【驚：おどろ】かした。
sentence.rom: Kodomo-tachi wa doa no kage ni kakurete, sensei o odorokashita.
sentence.tr_en: The children hid behind the door, and startled the teacher.
sentence.tr_de: Die Kinder versteckten sich hinter der Tür und erschreckten die Lehrerin.
sentence.explanation_en: 驚かす is a colloquial contraction of the more common form 驚かせる
sentence.explanation_de: 驚かす ist eine umgangssprachliche Verkürzung der gebräuchlicheren Form 驚かせる
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has n2 for odorokasu; odorokasu appears in Doraemon 12 p.89

word.tr_en: to surprise so.; to startle so.
word.rem: appears in Doraemon 12 p.89; lib0 only has the standard form 驚かせる

word.tr_en: to become quiet; to calm down
word.rem: jisho has n2

phrase.tr_en: to fall completely silent; to become still as death

sentence.s: 【嵐：あらし】が【静：しず】まった。
sentence.rom: Arashi ga shizumatta.
sentence.tr_en: The storm has calmed down.
sentence.tr_de: Der Sturm hat sich gelegt.

sentence.s: 【海：うみ】をじっと【眺：なが】めていると【私：わたし】は【気：き】が【静：しず】まる【感：かん】じがする。
sentence.rom: Umi o jitto nagamete iru to watashi wa ki ga shizumaru kanji ga suru.
sentence.tr_en: When I don't move and gaze out at the sea, I feel my mind calm down.
sentence.tr_de: Wenn ich still auf das Meer blicke, fühle ich mich innerlich ruhig.

word.tr_en: to be hazy; to be veiled in smoke
word.tr_de: dunstig sein; in Rauch verhüllt sein
word.rem: jisho has n1, but n3 for kemuri

sentence.s: エンジンから【煙：けむり】が【出：で】ています。
sentence.rom: Enjin kara kemuri ga dete imasu.
sentence.tr_en: The engine is giving off smoke.
sentence.tr_de: Aus dem Motor kommt Rauch heraus.

sentence.s: 【霧：きり】に【煙：けむ】る【富：ふ】【士：じ】【山：さん】を【眺：なが】めました。
sentence.rom: Kiri ni kemuru Fujisan o nagamemashita.
sentence.tr_en: I admired Mt Fuji that was veiled in fog.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bewunderte den in Nebel umhüllten Berg Fuji.

word.tr_en: to wet sth.; to soak; to moisten
word.rem: jisho has n2, but n4 for nureru

phrase.ph: ハンカチを【涙：なみだ】で【濡：ぬ】らす
phrase.tr_en: to soak one's handkerchief with tears

sentence.s: 【床：ゆか】を【濡：ぬ】らさないように【気：き】をつけて。
sentence.rom: Yuka o nurasanai yō ni ki o tsukete.
sentence.tr_en: Be careful not to get the floor wet.
sentence.tr_de: Pass auf, dass du nicht den Boden nass machst.

word.tr_en: to heighten; to boost; to elevate
word.rem: jisho has n2

phrase.tr_en: to boost the popularity of sth.
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

phrase.tr_en: to raise the awareness of sth.

sentence.s: 【環：かん】【境：きょう】【問：もん】【題：だい】への【関：かん】【心：しん】を【高：たか】めるために、さまざまな【取：と】り【組：く】みが【行：おこな】われている。
sentence.rom: Kankyō mondai e no kanshin o takameru tame ni, samazama na tori-kumi ga okonawarete iru.
sentence.tr_en: Various initiatives are being carried out to raise awareness in environmental issues.
sentence.tr_de: Verschiedene Initiativen sind im Begriff, durchgeführt zu werden, um das Bewusstsein für Umweltsprobleme zu fördern.

word.tr_en: to mix; to stir
word.rem: jisho has n2

sentence.s: 【牛：ぎゅう】【乳：にゅう】と【卵：たまご】を【混：ま】ぜなさい。
sentence.rom: Gyūnyū to tamago o mazenasai.
sentence.tr_en: Blend the milk and eggs together.
sentence.tr_de: Mische die Milch und die Eier zusammen.

word.tr_en: to mix; to put together
word.rem: jisho has n1; should be used in a sentence of mazeru-stir

word.tr_en: to be mixed; to be blended with
word.rem: jisho has n2

phrase.ph: 【砂：すな】と【金：きん】が【混：ま】ざったもの
phrase.rom: suna to kin ga mazatta mono
phrase.tr_en: a mixture of sand and gold
phrase.tr_de: ein Gemisch aus Sand und Gold
phrase.rem: jpod101 audio has similar: 黄色と青色が混ざったもの

sentence.s: 【油：あぶら】は【水：みず】と【混：ま】ざらない。
sentence.rom: Abura wa mizu to mazaranai.
sentence.tr_en: Oil and water don't mix.
sentence.tr_de: Öl und Wasser lassen sich nicht zusammenmischen.

word.tr_en: to invite sb.; to bring sth. about

phrase.ph: 【夕：ゆう】【食：しょく】に【招：まね】かれている

phrase.rem: 'to invite danger' would sound more intentional than 危険を招く

sentence.s: 【友：ゆう】【人：じん】をみんな【招：まね】いた。
sentence.rom: Yūjin o minna maneita.
sentence.tr_en: I invited all my friends.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe alle meine Freunde eingeladen.

word.tr_en: to put together; to assemble

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT
verified with ChatGPT

phrase.ph: 【機：き】【械：かい】を【組：く】み【立：た】てる
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has n2 for kumi-tateru
jisho has nx, but n3 for kumu, n5 for toru

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【腕：うで】を【組：く】んで【立：た】っていた。
sentence.rom: Kare wa ude o kunde tatte ita.
sentence.tr_en: He was standing with his arms folded.
sentence.tr_de: Er stand da mit verschränkten Armen.

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【足：あし】を【組：く】んで【座：すわ】っていた。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa ashi o kunde suwatte ita.
sentence.tr_en: She was sitting with her legs crossed.
sentence.tr_de: Sie sitzte da mit übereinander geschlagenen Beinen.

word.tr_en: to assemble; to set up; to construct
word.rem: jisho has n2, but n3 for kumu, n4 for tateru

word.tr_en: to like sth.; to prefer sth.

phrase.ph: 【黒：くろ】い【服：ふく】を【好：この】んで【着：き】る
phrase.tr_de: es vorziehen, schwarze Kleider zu tragen
phrase.rem: ChatGPT says 〜好んで〜する pattern is very common

sentence.s: 【猫：ねこ】はたいてい【肉：にく】より【魚：さかな】を【好：この】む。
sentence.rom: Neko wa taitei niku yori sakana o konomu.
sentence.tr_en: Cats tend to prefer fish to meat.
sentence.tr_de: Katzen mögen generell lieber Fisch als Fleisch.

word.tr_en: to decrease sth.; to diminish sth.; to shorten sth.
word.tr_de: etw. verringern; etw. vermindern; etw. kürzen

phrase.ph: 【甘：あま】いものの【量：りょう】を【減：へ】らす
phrase.rom: amai mono no ryō o herasu
phrase.tr_en: to cut down on sweets (eat less)

sentence.s: たばこの【量：りょう】を【減：へ】らしなさい。
sentence.rom: Tabako no ryō o herashi-nasai.
sentence.tr_en: Cut down on cigarettes.
sentence.tr_de: Reduziere deinen Tabakkonsum.

word.tr_en: to shake sth.; to turn down sb.
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section as kana only meaning to turn down sb.

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has nx for saikoro

sentence.s: 【使：し】【用：よう】する【前：まえ】に【瓶：びん】を【振：ふ】ってください。
sentence.rom: Shiyō suru mae ni bin o futte kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please shake the bottle before use.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte schütteln Sie die Flasche vor Gebrauch.

word.tr_en: to lose sth.

phrase.ph: お【金：かね】をたくさん【失：うしな】う
phrase.tr_en: to lose a lot of money
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; lib0 has たくさんの金を失う, but ChatGPT says my version is better

sentence.s: 【勇：ゆう】【気：き】を【失：うしな】わないで。
sentence.rom: Yūki o ushinawanaide.
sentence.tr_en: Don't lose your courage!
sentence.tr_de: Verliere den Mut nicht!

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【決：けっ】して【希：き】【望：ぼう】を【失：うしな】わない。
sentence.rom: Kare wa kesshite kibō o ushinawanai.
sentence.tr_en: He never loses hope.
sentence.tr_de: Er verliert nie die Hoffnung.

word.tr_en: to give up sth.; to abandon (hopes, plans)

phrase.ph: 【希：き】【望：ぼう】を【諦：あきら】める
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

phrase.ph: 【計：けい】【画：かく】を【諦：あきら】める
phrase.tr_en: to give up one's plans (one's project)
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【失：しっ】【敗：ぱい】しても【諦：あきら】めないで。
sentence.rom: Shippai shite mo akiramenaide.
sentence.tr_en: Don't give up even if you fail.
sentence.tr_de: Auch wenn du einmal versagst, gib nicht auf.

word.tr_en: to save up money
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section; jisho has nx

phrase.ph: お【金：かね】を【貯：た】めようとしている
phrase.rom: o-kane o tame-yō to shite iru
phrase.tr_en: to be trying to save money
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: その【旅：りょ】【行：こう】のためにお【金：かね】を【貯：た】めた。
sentence.rom: Sono ryokō no tame ni o-kane o tameta.
sentence.tr_en: I've saved up some money for that trip.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe Geld für diese Reise gespart.

word.tr_en: to translate; to interpret
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section and GENKI workbook p.35; jisho has n2

phrase.ph: 【日：に】【本：ほん】【語：ご】に【訳：やく】す
phrase.explanation_en: Also possible, but more formal and technical: 日本語に【翻：ほん】【訳：やく】する
phrase.explanation_de: Auch möglich, aber formeller und technischer: 日本語に【翻：ほん】【訳：やく】する

sentence.s: この【気：き】【持：も】ちは【言：こと】【葉：ば】に【訳：やく】せない。
sentence.rom: Kono kimochi wa kotoba ni yakusenai.
sentence.tr_en: I can't put this feeling into words.
sentence.tr_de: Ich kann dieses Gefühl nicht in Worte fassen.
sentence.rem: ChatGPT says 翻訳する would be wrong here

word.tr_en: to be put in order; to be solved
word.tr_de: in Ordnung gebracht werden; geklärt werden
word.rem: jisho has n2, but n4 for katadzukeru

phrase.ph: 【借：しゃっ】【金：きん】が【片：かた】【付：づ】いた

sentence.s: 【問：もん】【題：だい】が【片：かた】【付：づ】いてよかった。
sentence.rom: Mondai ga katadzuite yokatta.
sentence.tr_en: I'm glad the problem got sorted out.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin froh, dass das Problem gelöst ist.

word.tr_en: to scold sb.; to rebuke

sentence.s: 【先：せん】【生：せい】は【生：せい】【徒：と】を【意：い】【味：み】も【無：な】く【叱：しか】った。
sentence.rom: Sensei wa seito o imi mo naku shikatta.
sentence.tr_en: The teacher scolded the pupils for no reason.
sentence.tr_de: Der Lehrer schimpfte mit den Schülern ohne Grund.

word.tr_en: to throw down; to bring down

phrase.rem: jisho has nx for kiri-taosu

phrase.ph: 【座：ざ】【席：せき】の【背：せ】を【倒：たお】す
phrase.tr_en: to recline the back of one's seat
phrase.rem: ChatGPT says the opposite is 座席の背を起こす

sentence.s: 【座：ざ】【席：せき】の【背：せ】を【倒：たお】してもいいですか。
sentence.rom: Zaseki no se o taoshite mo ii desu ka?
sentence.tr_en: May I recline the back of my seat?
sentence.tr_de: Darf ich die Rückenlehne zurückklappen?

word.tr_en: to feel sad; to be depressed; to fall down
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section; jisho has n1

phrase.ph: 【経：けい】【済：ざい】の【落：お】ち【込：こ】み
phrase.tr_en: a decline in the economy; downturn
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has nx for ochi-komi

sentence.s: 【落：お】ち【込：こ】んでしまい【諦：あきら】めようかと【思：おも】った。
sentence.rom: Ochi-konde shimai akirame-yō ka to omotta.
sentence.tr_en: I felt so down that I though about giving up.
sentence.tr_de: Ich fühlte mich so deprimiert, dass ich überlegte aufzugeben.

word.tr_en: to bark; to bellow

sentence.s: 【犬：いぬ】が【吠：ほ】えている。
sentence.rom: Inu ga hoete iru.
sentence.tr_en: A dog is barking.
sentence.tr_de: Ein Hund bellt.

sentence.s: 【突：とつ】【然：ぜん】 【狼：おおかみ】が【吠：ほ】え【出：だ】した。
sentence.rom: Totsuzen ōkami ga hoe-dashita.
sentence.tr_en: Suddenly, the wolf began to bark.
sentence.tr_de: Plötzlich fing der Wolf an zu bellen.

word.tr_en: to betray; to turn traitor

sentence.s: 【本：ほん】【当：とう】の【友：とも】だちなら【君：きみ】を【裏：うら】【切：ぎ】ったりしないだろう。
sentence.rom: Hontō no tomodachi nara kimi o uragittari shinai darō.
sentence.tr_en: A true friend would not betray you.
sentence.tr_de: Ein echter Freund würde dich nicht hintergehen.

word.tr_en: to celebrate; to congratulate; to wish for (good fortune)

phrase.ph: 【記：き】【念：ねん】【日：び】を【祝：いわ】う
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for kinenbi, but n3 for kinen

phrase.ph: 【正：しょう】【月：がつ】を【祝：いわ】う
phrase.rem: o-shōgatsu appears in GENKI1 p.339; jisho has nx

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】たちは【彼：かれ】の【誕：たん】【生：じょう】【日：び】を【祝：いわ】った。
sentence.rom: Watashi-tachi wa kare no tanjōbi o iwatta.
sentence.tr_en: We celebrated his birthday.
sentence.tr_de: Wir haben seinen Geburtstag gefeiert.

word.tr_en: to shoot at; to attack

phrase.rem: shika appears in GENKI2 p.288; jisho has nx

sentence.s: 【鳥：とり】を【撃：う】ったことがないよ。
sentence.rom: Tori o utta koto ga nai yo.
sentence.tr_en: I have never shot a bird.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe noch nie einen Vogel geschossen.

word.tr_en: to make sure; to check

phrase.ph: 【安：あん】【全：ぜん】かどうかを【確：たし】かめる
phrase.rom: anzen ka dō ka o tashikameru
phrase.tr_en: to check whether they are safe or not
phrase.tr_de: prüfen, ob sie in Sicherheit sind oder nicht
phrase.rem: rephrased by ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【誰：だれ】も【見：み】ていないことを【確：たし】かめた。
sentence.rom: Dare mo mite inai koto o tashikameta.
sentence.tr_en: I made sure that nobody was watching.
sentence.tr_de: Ich stellte sicher, dass mich niemand beobachtete.

word.tr_en: to grasp; to grip; to clutch

phrase.ph: ロープをしっかりと【握：にぎ】る
phrase.rem: jisho has n1 for rōpu

sentence.s: 【子：こ】どもが【母：はは】【親：おや】の【手：て】をしっかり【握：にぎ】っていた。
sentence.rom: Kodomo ga hahaoya no te o shikkari nigitte ita.
sentence.tr_en: The child was holding his mother's hand tightly.
sentence.tr_de: Das Kind umklammerte die Hand seiner Mutter.

word.tr_en: to substitute sth.; to exchange sth.

sentence.s: 【塩：しお】は【別：べつ】のものに【代：か】えてもいいですか。
sentence.rom: Shio wa betsu no mono ni kaete mo ii desu ka?
sentence.tr_en: Is it OK to replace the salt with something else?
sentence.tr_de: Ist es okay, wenn ich das Salz mit etwas anderem ersetze?

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【電：でん】【池：ち】が【切：き】れたから【替：か】えた。
sentence.rom: Denchi ga kireta kara kaeta.
sentence.tr_en: Since the batteries were drained, I replaced them.
sentence.tr_de: Da die Batterien leer waren, habe ich sie ersetzt.

phrase.ph: 【円：えん】をユーロに【換：か】える
ポイントを【商：しょう】【品：ひん】に【換：か】える

word.tr_en: to act in place of sth.

phrase.rem: no kawari ni (instead of) is usually の代わりに (replacement)

sentence.s: 【部：ぶ】【長：ちょう】に【代：か】わって【私：わたし】が【説：せつ】【明：めい】します。
sentence.rom: Buchō ni kawatte watashi ga setsumei shimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I will explain it in place of the division manager.
sentence.tr_de: Ich werde es anstelle des Abteilungsleiters erklären.
sentence.explanation_en: In this context,「代わる」is more common than「替わる」
sentence.explanation_de: In diesem Kontext ist「代わる」gebräuchlicher als「替わる」

word.tr_en: to replace so.; to convert sth.
to change (places with); it replaces sth.
to replace
to take the place of
